text: I feel anticipation tinged with curiosity as I stand just outside this glass-walled space, glimpsing the 'R+D' display inside. The environment is sterile, brightly lit, and slightly disorienting from the dramatic camera tilt. The prospect of engaging with research and development—so centered on innovation and human coexistence with technology—sparks both excitement and a mild sense of unease. I am drawn toward what awaits inside, ready to reflect on how humans craft meaning in collaboration with machines.
